ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "incident_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of incident (e.g., Wildfire, Prescribed Fire) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State where the incident is located */,
  "incident_size" TEXT /* Size of the incident (e.g., acres, hectares) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the incident started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the incident ended (if applicable) */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the incident (e.g., lightning, human activity) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., active, contained, extinguished) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Numerical or categorical value indicating the severity of the incident */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the incident */,
  "external_data_source_id" TEXT /* Identifier for any external data source (e.g., weather service, satellite imagery) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Broader category of the incident type (e.g., natural, human-caused) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the incident type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state (e.g., CA, FL) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state (e.g., in square miles or square kilometers) */,
  "fire_risk_level" TEXT /* Numerical or categorical value indicating the fire risk level of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident size */,
  "size_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the size (e.g., acres, hectares) */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Value of the size */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the incident size */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the incident size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the resource is allocated to */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., personnel, equipment, supplies) */,
  "resource_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource */,
  "resource_status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource (e.g., available, in use, damaged) */,
  "allocated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was allocated to the incident */,
  "deallocated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was deallocated from the incident (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the personnel is allocated to */,
  "personnel_name" TEXT /* Name of the personnel */,
  "personnel_role" TEXT /* Role of the personnel (e.g., commander, firefighter) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the personnel */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the personnel was assigned to the incident */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the personnel was released from the incident (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the equipment is allocated to */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., vehicle, tool) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the equipment was acquired */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the equipment (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplies" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the supply is allocated to */,
  "supply_name" TEXT /* Name of the supply */,
  "supply_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the supply */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the supply (e.g., gallons, liters) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the supply (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplies_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the cost is associated with */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., personnel, equipment, supplies) */,
  "cost_amount" REAL /* Amount of the cost */,
  "cost_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the cost was incurred */,
  "cost_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cost */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the budget to which the cost is allocated (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the communication is related to */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "communication_text" TEXT /* Text of the communication */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who sent the communication */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who received the communication */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the communication was sent */,
  "communication_status" TEXT /* Status of the communication (e.g., sent, received, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or array of permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the update is for */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., size, status, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_updates_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the location is for */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location (e.g., in meters or feet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_locations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
